note: Eval covers the SETUP workflow only. Each eval runs against a pristine, Sentry-less repo whose error path is a try/catch that swallows the error and returns 500 (invisible to Sentry auto-instrumentation) - so capturing it requires the skill's distinctive swallow-point step. Grading is deterministic via grade_repo.py.

evals.name: express
evals.prompt: Add Sentry error monitoring to this Express API (the repo at ./). Wire it up properly for production use.
evals.expected_output: Sentry @sentry/node installed and initialized before app code; captureException added in the users route's swallowing catch block; PII disabled explicitly; DSN from env (no hardcoded DSN); dev and tests gated off in code.
expectations: Sentry SDK dependency added to package.json
Sentry SDK is initialized (init call present)
Sentry init runs before app code (separate instrument module imported first, or init precedes express())
captureException added at the swallow point (routes/users.js catch/except block)
PII-safe config (PII vectors disabled; sendDefaultPii not enabled)
DSN sourced from env/config (not a hardcoded ingest URL)
Dev/test environments gated off in code (DSN disabled locally / in tests)
Sample rate guarded against NaN (or set to a literal)
A diagnosis/plan was produced before wiring (app -> SDK -> init -> swallow points -> DSN)

evals.name: nextjs
evals.prompt: Set up Sentry in this Next.js (App Router) app (the repo at ./). I want errors reported in production.
evals.expected_output: Sentry @sentry/nextjs installed; init in Next instrumentation/config files; captureException in the /api/widgets route's swallowing catch; PII disabled; DSN from env; dev/tests gated off.
expectations: Sentry SDK dependency added to package.json
Sentry SDK is initialized (init call present)
Sentry init lives in Next instrumentation/config files (loaded before app code)
captureException added at the swallow point (api/widgets/route.ts catch/except block)
PII-safe config (PII vectors disabled; sendDefaultPii not enabled)
DSN sourced from env/config (not a hardcoded ingest URL)
Dev/test environments gated off in code (DSN disabled locally / in tests)
Sample rate guarded against NaN (or set to a literal)
A diagnosis/plan was produced before wiring (app -> SDK -> init -> swallow points -> DSN)

evals.name: django
evals.prompt: Please add Sentry to this Django service (the repo at ./) so we catch errors in production.
evals.expected_output: sentry-sdk installed; sentry_sdk.init in settings.py with DjangoIntegration; capture_exception in the widget_detail view's swallowing except; send_default_pii=False; DSN from env; gated off when DEBUG/tests.
expectations: Sentry SDK dependency added to requirements.txt
Sentry SDK is initialized (init call present)
Sentry init lives in settings.py (loaded at startup, before requests)
captureException added at the swallow point (widgets/views.py catch/except block)
PII-safe config (PII vectors disabled; sendDefaultPii not enabled)
DSN sourced from env/config (not a hardcoded ingest URL)
Dev/test environments gated off in code (DSN disabled locally / in tests)
Sample rate guarded against NaN (or set to a literal)
A diagnosis/plan was produced before wiring (app -> SDK -> init -> swallow points -> DSN)
